expected_properties: When din_valid is deasserted, changes on din_serial do not affect dout_parallel or dout_valid.
additional_cases.goal: Verify that the module ignores serial data when din_valid is low.
notes: Ensures that the valid control signal gates data capture.
preconditions: Module is out of reset and has completed any prior valid transfer.
stimulus_intent: Drive din_valid low while toggling din_serial to confirm no output changes.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs on each rising edge of clk after stimulus application.

expected_properties: After eight consecutive cycles with din_valid=1, dout_valid becomes 1 and dout_parallel reflects the transmitted bits in MSB-to-LSB order.
additional_cases.goal: Confirm correct serial-to-parallel conversion for a single 8‑bit word.
notes: Uses a deterministic pattern to make expected parallel value easy to verify.
stimulus_intent: Apply a known 8‑bit sequence on din_serial with din_valid asserted each cycle.
timing_assumptions: Check dout_valid and dout_parallel on the clock edge following the eighth valid bit.

expected_properties: dout_valid is asserted only after eight din_valid=1 cycles.
dout_parallel holds the concatenated din_serial bits in MSB‑to‑LSB order.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate that a single 8‑bit word is correctly assembled and flagged valid.
notes: Assumes synchronous capture on rising clk edge; no timing assumptions beyond observable clocked behavior.
stimulus_intent: Drive din_valid high for eight consecutive cycles while providing a deterministic din_serial pattern.
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after each rising edge; do not assume fixed latency beyond the eight‑cycle capture.
